2022-07-28: Important Note - We have changed the treatment of the **Δ Portfolio %** column in this table. Previously, we were reporting it as the *percent change* in the portfolio allocation. We are now reporting it as the raw change in the portfolio allocation (still reported as a percent). In formula terms, we were previously reporting it as 100 * (current allocation - prior allocation ) / prior allocation. We are now reporting it as (current allocation - prior allocation).

Section Title: SITUATIONAL AWARENESS LP > About
Content:
The **13F form** is a quarterly report that institutional investment managers in the U.S. are required to file with the **Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC)** if they manage over $100 million in assets.
This report provides an overview of SITUATIONAL AWARENESS LP based on data disclosed in their 13F filings. The 13F forms offer insights into the investment holdings of institutional managers, revealing their portfolio compositions, market positions, and strategic trends.
During 2025-Q4, SITUATIONAL AWARENESS LP reported a market value of $5.52B, an increase of 33.3% with respect to the previous quarter. During this quarter, SITUATIONAL AWARENESS LP reported 29 holdings.
SITUATIONAL AWARENESS LP’s top holding in this period was BLOOM ENERGY CORP with a value of $876M, while its top buy was SANDISK CORP ( +$237M ) and its top sell was COREWEAVE INC ( -$126M ).
